segments.lat: ut me levarat tuus adventus sic discessus adfiixit. qua re cum poteris, id est cum Sexti auctioni operam dederis, revises nos. vel unus dies mihi erit utilis, quid dicam gratus ? ipse Romam venirem ut una essemus, si satis consultum quadam de re haberem.
segments.eng: As your coming had relieved me, so your departure has cast me down. So when you can --- that is, when you have given your attention to Sextus' auction --- come see me again. Even a single day will be useful to me, not to say welcome. I would come to Rome myself, so that we might be together, if I had taken sufficient counsel on a certain matter.
